title: Awesome Chocolates Sales Analytics
description: Interactive Power BI report for chocolate sales leadership covering revenue, profit, shipment efficiency, geography, products, and salesperson performance.
insights: Built a 7-page Power BI report with 30 DAX measures and full month-over-month KPI tracking.
Analyzed 6,113 shipments across 6 countries, 22 products, and 25 salespeople.
Found balanced geography performance, with only a $400K gap between the highest and lowest country sales.
